overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a foggy nighttime view of Night City from the Badlands hills. The camera slowly pans across the neon-lit skyline before tilting up to reveal the full moon, then returning to continue panning across the cityscape.

events.description: neon signage including 'SOFTSYS' billboard becomes visible on the right side as the pan continues

agents.ego_description: standing on a rocky hillside slowly panning right across the distant neon-lit city skyline

entered.detail: dark barren hillside slope in the immediate foreground
distant cyberpunk cityscape with scattered lights visible through haze
cluster of tall buildings with bright neon illumination
thick fog layer obscuring the lower portions of distant buildings
large cyan neon billboard with 'SOFTSYS' text visible on a building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, foggy hillside overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. The camera slowly pans right across the distant skyline, revealing towering corporate buildings with neon accents partially obscured by atmospheric haze. The rocky terrain of the Badlands fills the left foreground while the illuminated city stretches across the horizon.

events.description: camera tilts upward from the city horizon toward the night sky
view transitions from cityscape to open sky revealing the full moon

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to gaze at the full moon and clear night sky above the hillside

entered.detail: bright full moon glowing against the dark teal night sky
clear dark sky with teal color grading and faint stars

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward from the city view to focus on the night sky, revealing a bright full moon against a deep teal backdrop. The rocky hillside now fills more of the left frame as the cityscape disappears below the horizon, creating a moment of natural contrast against the previous urban vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside overlook of Night City western district

events.description: camera tilts back down from the sky to resume viewing the city skyline
view returns to cityscape revealing the western district with industrial towers

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan slowly across the cityscape, surveying different districts and neon advertisements

entered.detail: distant cityscape returning to view with different building angles
cyan neon billboard with 'SOFTSYS' text visible again on the right
cluster of industrial buildings with red and orange lighting on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts back down to the city, resuming the panoramic sweep of Night City from the Badlands. The SOFTSYS neon sign is visible again on the right as the pan continues, revealing the industrial western districts with their distinct orange glow. The rocky hillside returns to its original foreground position while the hazy city lights stretch across the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that pans across a neon-lit cyberpunk skyline before tilting toward the night sky and returning to the urban horizon. It begins on a dark, foggy hillside in the Badlands, slowly panning right to reveal towering corporate buildings and neon accents partially obscured by atmospheric haze. As the movement progresses, the camera tilts upward, leaving the cityscape behind to focus on a bright full moon set against a deep teal backdrop. The scene then shifts back down toward the metropolis, resuming its panoramic sweep as the rocky terrain returns to the foreground. Finally, the pan continues past the SOFTSYS neon sign to reveal the industrial western districts and their distinct orange glow stretching across the hazy horizon.
